originalTitle: Why Western Digital (WDC) Is Benefiting From AI-Driven Storage Demand and Tight HDD Supply Conditions
summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is one of the best performing AI stocks over the last 3 years, with a 3Y CAGR of 173%. On June 15, Morgan Stanley analyst Erik Woodring maintained an Overweight rating and raised his price target to $650 from $488. Woodring’s thesis centered on a widening hard-disk-drive shortage. He estimated demand […]
content:
Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is one of the best performing AI stocks over the last 3 years , with a 3Y CAGR of 173%. On June 15, Morgan Stanley analyst Erik Woodring maintained an Overweight rating and raised his price target to $650 from $488. Woodring's thesis centered on a widening hard-disk-drive shortage. He estimated demand was growing 40% to 50% annually against supply growth of 30% to 35%, with cloud expansion and AI inference increasing storage requirements. Rising NAND flash prices also make high-capacity hard drives more economically attractive for some large datasets, supporting more predictable pricing. Western Digital shares gained 16% that day, leading the S&P 500.

Copyright: andreykuzmin / 123RF Stock Photo

Bank of America reiterated Buy with a $732 target on July 1. The durability of the thesis depends on supply discipline and workload growth. If customers delay deployments, reuse existing capacity, or shift their storage mix, tightness could ease. For now, analyst attention has moved from unit volumes toward pricing power and data-center demand visibility.

Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) develops data-storage devices and platforms, with a primary focus on high-capacity hard disk drives used in cloud data centers, enterprise systems, video applications, and consumer storage.

While we acknowledge the risk and potential of WDC as an investment, our conviction lies in the belief that some AI stocks hold greater promise for delivering higher returns and doing so within a shorter time frame. If you are looking for an AI stock that is more promising than WDC and that has 10,000% upside potential, check out our report about the cheapest AI stock .

chineseTitle: 为什么西部数据 (WDC) 受益于 AI 驱动的存储需求和紧张的 HDD 供应状况

chineseContent:
Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is one of the best performing AI stocks over the last 3 years , with a 3Y CAGR of 173%. 6月15日，摩根士丹利分析师Erik Woodring维持增持评级，并将目标价从488美元上调至650美元。 Woodring's thesis centered on a widening hard-disk-drive shortage.他估计，随着云扩展和人工智能推理增加存储需求，需求每年增长 40% 到 50%，而供应增长为 30% 到 35%。 NAND 闪存价格的上涨也使得大容量硬盘对于某些大型数据集更具经济吸引力，从而支持更可预测的定价。 Western Digital shares gained 16% that day, leading the S&P 500.

Copyright: andreykuzmin / 123RF Stock Photo

Bank of America reiterated Buy with a $732 target on July 1. The durability of the thesis depends on supply discipline and workload growth. If customers delay deployments, reuse existing capacity, or shift their storage mix, tightness could ease. For now, analyst attention has moved from unit volumes toward pricing power and data-center demand visibility.

西部数据公司（纳斯达克股票代码：WDC）开发数据存储设备和平台，主要关注云数据中心、企业系统、视频应用和消费存储中使用的大容量硬盘驱动器。

While we acknowledge the risk and potential of WDC as an investment, our conviction lies in the belief that some AI stocks hold greater promise for delivering higher returns and doing so within a shorter time frame.
